x_snc_airop_check_definition.ai_justification: Vendor engagement volume reflects active third-party relationship management activity that benefits from AI-assisted monitoring and risk signal detection. Higher engagement volumes increase the ROI of Now Assist vendor risk analysis capabilities.
x_snc_airop_check_definition.remediation_guidance: Initiate vendor engagements in TPRM to build the data foundation for AI risk assessment.

sys_update_version.name: x_snc_airop_check_definition_9ff89dc7cfd587108935fb251d851c38
sys_update_version.payload:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?><record_update table="x_snc_airop_check_definition"><x_snc_airop_check_definition action="INSERT_OR_UPDATE"><ai_justification><![CDATA[Vendor engagement volume reflects active third-party relationship management activity that benefits from AI-assisted monitoring and risk signal detection. Higher engagement volumes increase the ROI of Now Assist vendor risk analysis capabilities.]]></ai_justification><check_name>Vendor Engagement Volume</check_name><check_script><![CDATA[(function(){
var ga=new GlideAggregate("sn_vdr_risk_asmt_vendor_engagement");
ga.addAggregate("COUNT");ga.query();
var c=ga.next()?parseInt(ga.getAggregate("COUNT")):0;
if(c>=50)return{status:"ready",actualValue:c+" engagements",finding:c+" vendor engagements found."};
if(c>0)return{status:"needs_attention",actualValue:c+" engagements",finding:c+" vendor engagements found."};
return{status:"value_blocker",actualValue:"0 engagements",finding:"No vendor engagements found."};
})()]]></check_script><is_active>true</is_active><is_clone_sensitive>false</is_clone_sensitive><is_manual>false</is_manual><module>TPRM</module><number>CHK0000585</number><order/><remediation_guidance>Initiate vendor engagements in TPRM to build the data foundation for AI risk assessment.</remediation_guidance><sys_class_name>x_snc_airop_check_definition</sys_class_name><sys_created_by>admin</sys_created_by><sys_created_on>2026-06-10 06:41:21</sys_created_on><sys_id>9ff89dc7cfd587108935fb251d851c38</sys_id><sys_mod_count>1</sys_mod_count><sys_name>Vendor Engagement Volume</sys_name><sys_package display_value="ServiceNow AI Readiness Optimization Platform" source="x_snc_airop">73e2562fcf244b908935fb251d851c78</sys_package><sys_policy/><sys_scope display_value="ServiceNow AI Readiness Optimization Platform">73e2562fcf244b908935fb251d851c78</sys_scope><sys_update_name>x_snc_airop_check_definition_9ff89dc7cfd587108935fb251d851c38</sys_update_name><sys_updated_by>admin</sys_updated_by><sys_updated_on>2026-06-10 06:54:02</sys_updated_on></x_snc_airop_check_definition></record_update>
